restaurants.address: 297 Broome St, New York, NY 10002, USA

restaurants.address: 9 Chatham Square, New York, NY 10038, USA

restaurants.name: Sunn's

restaurants.name: Maxi's Noodle 3
restaurants.address: 68 Mott St, New York, NY 10013, USA

restaurants.name: Gazab
restaurants.address: 179 Essex St, New York, NY 10002, USA

restaurants.name: Golden Steer at One Fifth
restaurants.address: 1 5th Ave, New York, NY 10003, USA

restaurants.name: Stars
restaurants.address: 139 E 12th St, New York, NY 10003, USA

restaurants.name: Odo East Village
restaurants.address: 536 E 5th St, New York, NY 10009, USA

restaurants.name: Cô Lạc
restaurants.address: 234 E 4th St, New York, NY 10009, USA
restaurants.note: Chef Helen Nguyen (Saigon Social). $55 set menu, bánh dumplings, dry-aged duck. Grub Street April pick.

restaurants.name: TBD Gimbap
restaurants.address: 31 Carmine St, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: Nami Nori team pop-up. Lines forming before open sign flips. Takeout gimbap ~$12. Runs through May+.

restaurants.name: Beto's Carnitas & Guisados
restaurants.address: 69 Clinton St Store front A, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Daily carnitas in steel cauldron. Guisados, gorditas with heirloom Masienda corn. Grub Street pick.

restaurants.name: L'Industrie Pizzeria - Little Italy
restaurants.address: 197 Grand St, New York, NY 10013, USA
restaurants.note: Third location of beloved Williamsburg slice shop. Standing room only. Opened March 19.

restaurants.name: Fat Ronnie's Burger Bar
restaurants.address: 303 6th Ave, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: Martha's Vineyard import. Thick patties, fish sandwiches, chopped cheese. Harlem family legacy.

restaurants.name: Bar Chucho
restaurants.address: 37 Market St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: From Corima team. Cantina bar with cocktails, micheladas, queso chihuahua burger. Opening April 2.

restaurants.name: After Eden
restaurants.address: 162 Orchard St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Vietnamese coffee by day, SE Asian cocktails at night. Osamil/Hwaro vet. Opening April.

restaurants.name: Oriana
restaurants.address: 174 Mott St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.note: Noortwyck team's 80-seat Nolita spot. Wood-fired grill, 7000-bottle cellar. Opening May.

restaurants.name: Good Time Country Buffet
restaurants.address: 166 1st Ave, New York, NY 10009, USA
restaurants.note: From Kisa + C as in Charlie team. Fried chicken, collards, Southern buffet concept. Opening spring.

restaurants.name: Dean's
restaurants.address: 213 6th Ave, New York, NY 10014, USA
restaurants.note: From King team (Annie Shi + Jess Shadbolt). Stargazy pie, Guinness, sticky pudding. Opened March 31.

restaurants.name: Strange Delight
restaurants.address: 63 Lafayette Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217, USA
restaurants.note: Modern oyster bar near BAM. Brooklyn-New Orleans vibe, great fried shrimp, cocktails. Jim's pick.

restaurants.name: Soba Ulala
restaurants.address: 73 Thompson St, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.note: From Hirohisa chef. House-made soba twice daily w/ buckwheat from upstate NY. Sashimi, tamago sides. Eater April spotlight.

restaurants.name: Cocktail Omakase
restaurants.address: 217 Eldridge St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: From Superbueno/Katana Kitten team. Tokyo-inspired 4-cocktail + 4-bite omakase ($55). Menu changes biweekly. Walk-in Bar 7 next door.

restaurants.name: Pies 'n' Thighs (Prospect Heights)
restaurants.address: 244 Flatbush Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217, USA
restaurants.note: Second location of 20-year Williamsburg staple. Fried chicken, catfish, biscuits. More family-friendly. Opened April 1.

restaurants.name: Grimm Tavern
restaurants.address: 659 Vanderbilt Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11238, USA
restaurants.note: Grimm Artisanal Ales opens tavern in former Olmsted space. Burger, roast chicken, craft beer. Opening April.

restaurants.name: Bar Ferdinando
restaurants.address: 151 Union St, Brooklyn, NY 11231, USA
restaurants.note: In century-old Ferdinando's Focacceria space. Swoony's/Cafe Spaghetti team. All-day Italian cafe, Sicilian dishes, baked goods. Opening April 15.

restaurants.name: Falansai
restaurants.address: 120 Norman Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA
restaurants.note: Moved from Bushwick. All-day format. Duck-neck tamales, pho-spiced lamb, $58 tasting. Grub Street April highlight.

restaurants.name: Café Fleuri
restaurants.address: 109 Washington St, New York, NY 10006, USA
restaurants.note: Southern France + North African touches. In old Schilling space. Chef drama (Baumgart left). Poached haddock, lamb shoulder, rice pudding.

restaurants.name: Trudie's Tavern
restaurants.address: 524 Court St, Brooklyn, NY 11231, USA
restaurants.note: From Gertrude's/Gertie team. Burgers, raw bar, martinis, latkes. Opening early May.

restaurants.name: Sono
restaurants.address: 176 1st Ave, New York, NY 10009, USA
restaurants.note: Korean-Italian trattoria. Housemade soju, handmade noodles, bottarga pasta with nori. Now open.

restaurants.name: Or'esh
restaurants.address: 450 W Broadway, New York, NY 10012, USA
restaurants.note: From Corner Store team (one of Manhattan's toughest resos). Chef Nadav Greenberg (ex-Shmoné/Eyal Shani). Wood-fired, live-fire grill. Just opened.

restaurants.name: Third Time's the Charm
restaurants.address: 275 Van Brunt St, Brooklyn, NY 11231, USA
restaurants.note: From Bad Cholesterol pizza cult. Wood-fired pies, chicken nuggets w/ gochujang, blooming onion, cocktails. Backyard. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Barker Cafeteria
restaurants.address: 395 Nostrand Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11216, USA
restaurants.note: Daytime spot. Focaccia sandwiches, roast beef w/ horseradish, chicken noodle soup, apple fritters. The 'Dad Plate.' Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Confidant
restaurants.address: 127 Atlantic Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11201, USA
restaurants.note: Relocated to Brooklyn Heights. New American. Added to Eater Brooklyn heatmap March 2026.

restaurants.name: Bistrot Ha
restaurants.address: 137 Eldridge St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: Follow-up to Ha's Snack Bar. Weekly rotating menu. Crab soup w/ calf's brain, oyster martini, vol-au-vents. CN Traveler pick March 2026.

restaurants.name: Ramblin' Chick
restaurants.address: 512 Court St, Brooklyn, NY 11231, USA
restaurants.note: From Ample Hills founders. Fried chicken, burgers. Court St. Grub Street mention April 2026.

restaurants.name: Gigi's
restaurants.address: 138 Franklin St, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA
restaurants.note: From Fulgurances Laundromat team. Rotisserie chicken w/ trio of sauces, frisée salad, natural wine list, housemade terrines. Opens April 8.

restaurants.name: Sea & Soil
restaurants.address: 388 Atlantic Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11217, USA
restaurants.note: Worker-owned coop. Relocated from Cobble Hill. Smoked trout sandwiches, Sunday pizza. Sliding scale pricing. Infatuation just-added.

restaurants.name: Kelang
restaurants.address: 715 Manhattan Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA
restaurants.note: From Hainan Chicken House (Sunset Park). Oxtail rendang w/ Haitian-Malaysian rice. Caribbean-Southeast Asian fusion. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Border Town
restaurants.address: 189 Nassau Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA
restaurants.note: Cult pop-up gone brick-and-mortar. Tortilla master Jorge Aguilar's Northern Mexican. Flour tortillas, tacos de guisados. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Diljān Bakery
restaurants.address: 330 Hicks St, Brooklyn, NY 11201, USA
restaurants.note: Afghan naan, halwa sticky buns, sheer pira pastries. From Little Flower Cafe team + baker Bryan Ford. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Ms. Alice
restaurants.address: 79 Rivington St, New York, NY 10002, USA
restaurants.note: European aperitivo culture. Yuzu negroni, pickled blueberry martini, terrace. Secret NYC April pick.

restaurants.name: Il Leone
restaurants.address: 158 7th Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11215, USA
restaurants.note: Cult Peaks Island pizzamaker Ben Wexler-Waite's NYC return. Naturally leavened, Neapolitan-style. Maine/Italian ingredients, lobster 'Isola' pie. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Vato
restaurants.address: 226 7th Ave Floor 1, Brooklyn, NY 11215, USA
restaurants.note: All-day from Corima chef Fidel Caballero. Tortillas, breakfast burritos, conchas. El Paso/Ciudad Juárez heritage. Eater Brooklyn heatmap.

restaurants.name: Tamalería La Madrina
restaurants.address: 735 Nostrand Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11216, USA
restaurants.note: From Taqueria Milear team. Tight menu: antojitos, taquitos, tamales. Oaxaqueño w/ pork in banana leaf is standout. Infatuation Brooklyn hit list.

restaurants.name: Mariscos El Submarino (Park Slope)
restaurants.address: 226 7th Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11215, USA
restaurants.note: 5th location. Walk-in only. Aguachiles, el gobernador tacos, tostadas with buttery tuna. Infatuation 8.2 rating. Brooklyn hit list.

restaurants.name: GiGi Curry & Noodle Bar
restaurants.address: 264 Bleecker St, Brooklyn, NY 11237, USA
restaurants.note: Quick-service Thai noodle shop. Added to Eater Brooklyn heatmap March 2026. Bushwick only — included for exceptional quality.

restaurants.name: Café Mulberry
restaurants.address: 240 Mulberry St, New York, NY 10012, USA

restaurants.name: What The Falafel
restaurants.address: 124 MacDougal St, New York, NY 10012, USA

restaurants.name: 100 Feast & Lounge
restaurants.address: 100 E Broadway fl 2, New York, NY 10002, USA

restaurants.name: Pierogi Boys
restaurants.address: 445 Albee Square W, Brooklyn, NY 11201, USA

preferences.brooklyn_weighting: Favor West and Central Brooklyn (Fort Greene, Park Slope, Crown Heights, Prospect Heights, Bed-Stuy, Gowanus, Sunset Park, etc.) over North Brooklyn and Williamsburg. Jim lives in Brooklyn.
